title: Changing the Robot
description:
Changing the Robot

Changing the Robot

CAUTION	■	Changing
		 the manipulator should be done with great caution. It initializes
		 the robot calibration parameters (Hofs, CalPls), additional axis
		 information, and PG parameter data. Before changing the robot,
		 make sure to save the calibration data by following the procedure
		 below.

(1) In the Epson RC+ 8.0 menu, select
		 [Setup]-[System Configuration].

(2) Select [Controller]-[Robots]-[Robot**]-[Calibration].
		 Then click the [Save] button.

In
	 the Epson RC+ 8.0 menu, select [Setup]-[System Configuration].

Select
	 [Controller]-[Robots]-[Robot**].

Click
	 the [Change] button. The following dialog will appear.

Input
	 the robot name and serial number printed on the name plate of the
	 manipulator. Any serial number can be entered. However, enter the
	 number printed on the manipulator.

Select
	 the robot type in the [Robot Family] box.

Select
	 the series name of the manipulator in the [Series] box.

Select
	 the robot model in the [Model] box.

	Available robots will be displayed according to the format of the currently
	 installed motor driver. If you use [Dry run], all robots selected
	 in step 6 will be shown.

Click
	 the [OK] button. The controller will be restarted.

NOTE:  For the Controller with Safety Board, assign a robot using the safety function to Robot 1.
